summary: Comprehensive E2E Role Audit for Photographer, Pro Surfer, Standard Surfer, Gold-Pass, and Cross-Role Interactions. Backend tests: 33/33 passed. Frontend tests: Grom Parent role verified successfully with correct sidebar items.

integration_issues.issue: Photographer, Pro Surfer, and Standard Surfer test accounts redirect to subscription page on login, preventing full sidebar verification

action_items: Add subscription_tier to test accounts (Photographer, Pro Surfer, Standard Surfer) to enable full sidebar testing
Consider adding 'Continue with Free tier' link on subscription pages for easier testing
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.js role-based logic is correctly implemented - isPhotographer, isSurfer, isCompetitive, hasStokesAccess all properly defined
TopNav.js correctly shows Blue Live Icon for Pro Photographers only, Bookings icon for Grom Parents
GalleryPage.js has pricing controls with data-testid='edit-gallery-pricing-btn'
Pro-Zone 0.5-mile restriction is implemented in social_live.py
Gold-Pass 24h booking window is implemented in career.py with proper elite_tier check

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Grom Parent verified, other roles blocked by subscription redirect

context_for_next_testing_agent: Test accounts for Photographer, Pro Surfer, and Standard Surfer need subscription_tier set to bypass subscription page redirect. Grom Parent account works and shows correct sidebar (Photo Tools with Grom Archive, Grom HQ, Gear Hub, NO Earnings/Active Duty). Backend API tests all pass - role-based endpoints working correctly.

photographer_tier.sidebar_photo_tools: Code verified - shows Earnings, Bookings, Live Sessions, On-Demand for Photographer/Approved Pro roles
photographer_tier.topnav_camera_icon: Code verified - BlueLiveIcon shown for Photographer/Approved Pro only
photographer_tier.gallery_pricing: Code verified - Edit Pricing button with data-testid exists
photographer_tier.pro_zone_signal: API verified - /api/social-live/pro-zone-check endpoint exists with 0.5-mile restriction

pro_surfer_tier.blue_ring_broadcast: Code verified - isProPhotographer check in TopNav.js

standard_surfer_tier.not_blocked_by_parent_link: API verified - profile shows parent_link_approved=true for adult surfers
standard_surfer_tier.bookings_icon: Code verified - Bookings in sidebar navItems
standard_surfer_tier.no_active_duty: Code verified - isPhotographer check excludes Surfer role

gold_pass.early_access_slots: API verified - /api/career/gold-pass/available endpoint with is_elite check
gold_pass.24h_booking_window: Code verified - gold_pass_expires_at check in career.py line 539-547

cross_role.photographer_tagging: Code verified - tagged_surfer_ids in gallery.py creates notifications
cross_role.grom_tagging_permission: Code verified - Grom Parent role check in gallery.py

grom_parent_ui_verification.earnings_dashboard: NOT FOUND (correct - Grom Parents cannot sell)
grom_parent_ui_verification.active_duty: NOT FOUND (correct - Grom Parents are not pro photographers)
grom_parent_ui_verification.topnav_bookings: FOUND - CalendarDays icon for booking photographers
